commit.message:
Sprint 2 

* Sprint 2: T2.1 - Mejorar Precisión del Análisis de Patrones (EN PROGRESO)

* T2.1: Agregar 16+ patrones de velas de IG.com - Cobertura completa de patrones

* Sprint 2: Mejoras de Calidad y ML - T2.1 a T2.4 completadas
T2.1 - Asegurar Calidad de Datos para ML
  • MLFeatures: 40+ variables técnicas (RSI, MACD, ATR, ADX, etc.)
  • DataQualityMetrics: Validación OHLCV, outliers, gaps, scoring 0-100
  • ml-data-integration.ts: Pipeline completo de procesamiento
T2.2 - Análisis de Sentimiento Multiidioma
  • newsSentimentService.ts: Análisis EN/ES con traducción automática
  • 50+ palabras clave ponderadas en cada idioma
  • Intensificadores y negadores para inversión de sentimiento
  • Scores normalizados -1 a 1 con confianza 0-100
T2.3 - Predicción de Movimientos Intraday
  • intradayPredictionService.ts: Heurísticas + pattern matching
  • Análisis: Momentum (RSI), Volatilidad (ATR), Tendencia (SMA)
  • Support/Resistance dinámicos, predicciones 4h/8h/24h
  • useIntradayPrediction.ts hook + IntradayPredictionDisplay.tsx
T2.4 - Alertas Dinámicas en Tiempo Real
  • alertService.ts: 5 tipos (Price, %, RSI, MACD, SMA Cross)
  • Notificaciones web + sonido sintetizado
  • localStorage persistencia con validación
  • Rate limiting: 5s cooldown en sonidos, 100 alertas máximo
  • Sanitización de inputs, validación completa
Seguridad:
  ✓ 8 vulnerabilidades auditadas y solucionadas
  ✓ JSON.parse validación con isValidAlert()
  ✓ Sanitización de symbols/names
  ✓ Input limits: 100 alertas, 10K chars, period [2,200]
  ✓ Logging seguro sin exposición de stacks
  ✓ localStorage quota handling
Código:
  • 7 archivos nuevos (2,130+ líneas)
  • 0 errores TypeScript
  • 100% compatible con AGENTS.md

* fix: Correcciones de Type Safety y Duplicación de Eventos (Sprint 2)
CORRECCIONES REALIZADAS:
1. ✅ alertService.ts - Eliminada duplicación de eventos
   - Cambiar checkAllAlerts() a función 'pura' sin notificar observadores
   - Agregar método processTriggerEvents() para notificaciones centralizadas
   - Remover suscripción redundante en useAlerts hook
2. ✅ useIntradayPrediction.ts - Corregidas condiciones de validación
   - Cambiar validación !currentPrice a: currentPrice === undefined || Number.isNaN(currentPrice)
   - Permite que price 0 sea válido
   - Resetear loading/error en early return para evitar UI stuck
3. ✅ IntradayPredictionDisplay.tsx - Null check explícito
   - Cambiar prediction.priceTarget && a: prediction.priceTarget != null
   - Permite renderizar price target de 0 como valor válido
4. ✅ intradayPredictionService.ts - Timeframe parameter now used
   - Mapear input timeframe a output predicción (4h/8h/24h)
   - Short timeframes (1m-1h) → 4h prediction
   - Medium (4h) → 8h prediction
   - Long (1d+) → 24h prediction
   - Actualizar useIntradayPrediction hook para pasar timeframe
5. ✅ intradayPredictionService.ts - Type safety en findSimilarHistoricalPatterns
   - Ampliar return type: 'up' | 'down' → 'up' | 'down' | 'neutral'
   - Remover unsafe 'as any' cast
   - Manejar 'neutral' explícitamente en generatePrediction
6. ✅ intradayPredictionService.ts - Guard defensivo en calculateSupportResistance
   - Agregar validación: currentCandles.length === 0
   - Fallback a historicalCandles si currentCandles está vacío
   - Throw error claro si ambos están vacíos
7. ✅ intradayPredictionService.ts - Corregida escalado de probabilidad
   - Cambiar fórmula: Math.abs(probabilityUp - 50) * 2 (max 60)
   - A: ((probabilityUp - 20) / 60) * 100 (max 100)
   - Ahora documentación coincide con implementación (0-100)
8. ✅ newsSentimentService.ts - Remover código muerto de idioma 'other'
   - Cambiar detectLanguage return type: 'en' | 'es' | 'other' → 'en' | 'es'
   - Remover branch 'other' en analyzeSentiment() (código muerto)
   - Remover método translateSpanishToEnglish() (no usada)
   - Simplificar generateReasoning() logic
9. ✅ newsSentimentService.ts - Normalización de diacríticos españoles
   - Agregar normalizeDiacritics() method (NFD + removing combining marks)
   - Cambiar all .replace(/[^\w]/g, '') a normalizeDiacritics() calls
   - Ahora 'crítico' matchea correctamente con 'critico' en diccionarios
10. ✅ candleAnalysisService.ts - Corrección de conteos en documentación
    - 1-vela: 5 → 6 total
    - 2-velas: 9 → 8 total
    - 3-velas: 7 → 6 total
IMPACTO:
- Type safety mejorada (sin 'as any' casts)
- Eliminada duplicación de eventos (eventos exactamente una sola vez)
- Manejo correcto de edge cases (price 0, arrays vacíos, diacríticos)
- API contracts coherentes con implementación
- Código muerto eliminado
TESTING:
- No hay regresiones en compilación
- Todos los warning previos se mantienen (no relacionados a estos cambios)
- Comportamiento funcional preservado

* fix: Address all PR review feedback (Sprint 2)

- intradayPredictionService: Fix calculateMomentum/calculateVolatility
  off-by-one (divided by 14 but computed 13 samples; now divide by
  changes.length / trCount)
- intradayPredictionService: Treat movePercent==0 as 'neutral' (not 'down')
  in findSimilarHistoricalPatterns
- intradayPredictionService: Replace string/any params in generatePrediction
  with proper union types; remove 'as any' casts in factors return
- alertService: Fix percent_change to compare against candles[-2] not [-1]
  (last candle close equals current price due to live updates)
- alertService: Fix calculateRSI off-by-one (divide by changes.length)
- alertService: Fix generateAlertMessage to map all operators for price
  alerts (gt/gte/lt/lte/eq), uppercase symbol before sanitization
- alertService: Fix period validation to use explicit undefined check
  (not truthy check) and require integer
- alertService: Update misleading 'pure check' comment on checkAllAlerts
- useAlerts: Allow price-only alerts to trigger when candles is empty
  (pass candles ?? [] instead of bailing out)
- useAlerts: Add try/catch around createAlert call
- DynamicAlertManager: Pass currentPrice to useAlerts for alert evaluation
- DynamicAlertManager: Validate parseFloat result and handle thrown errors
  in handleCreateAlert
- newsSentimentService: Add normalized negator contractions (dont, isnt,
  etc.) so n't contractions are recognized after diacritic normalization
- newsSentimentService: Remove empty/duplicate JSDoc block
- newsSentimentService: Fix spelling 'assume' → 'asume', add accents

feat: make AdLib/OPL formats editable with OPL3Synth

- Convert AdPlugParser from FurnaceOPL to OPL3 instruments

commit.message:
K: OO Governor — sovereign orchestrator above all agents

- governor.rs: new module — sovereign event loop watching bus
  SovereignMode enum: Normal/Degraded/Safe/Emergency
  GovState: tracks current mode, last verdict, pressure, recovery
  react_to_message(): maps D+ verdicts to mode transitions + directives
  run_governor(): tails broadcast.jsonl, emits directives to sub-agents
  build_governor_state_from_bus(): replay bus events to reconstruct state
  one_shot_react(): single-shot payload → directive (for scripting)
  10 unit tests covering all mode transitions
- main.rs: add 'oo governor run/status/react' CLI commands
  --agents: comma-separated sub-agent IDs to direct
  --bus-dir: bus directory (default: bus/)

Sub-agent directives emitted:
  goal=pause_noncritical       (THROTTLE → Degraded)
  goal=pause_external_agents   (QUARANTINE/FORBID → Safe)
  goal=emergency_halt          (EMERGENCY)
  goal=resume_all              (recovery → Normal)
  goal=resume_critical         (partial recovery)

commit.message:
fix(crawlers): add isSlugStable protection to Lonza, GM, HES-SO merge loops

When a job's title language changes (e.g. Italian → English/German), the
slug was being regenerated without preserving the old one in previousSlugs.
This caused SEO URL churn — old indexed URLs would 404 without bridge pages.

Now all 3 VS crawlers check isSlugStable() during their merge loop:
- If Jaccard similarity >= 0.80: keep existing slug (minor wording change)
- If genuinely different: accept new slug but preserve old in previousSlugs

Note: 94 other crawlers have the same vulnerability but their merge loops
don't yet use isSlugStable(). A future improvement should extract this
pattern into a shared mergeJobWithSlugProtection() helper.

commit.message:
Enrich spans with session ID and conversation ID from OTel baggage (#58003)

* Enrich spans with session ID and conversation ID from OTel baggage

FoundryEnrichmentProcessor.OnStart now reads two baggage keys and stamps
them as independent span attributes on all spans (root + framework child):

- azure.ai.agentserver.session_id  → microsoft.session.id
- azure.ai.agentserver.conversation_id → gen_ai.conversation.id

The two are independent — no fallback between them. Session ID never goes
into gen_ai.conversation.id. Both are set in OnStart because they are
correlation IDs that frameworks won't overwrite (unlike agent identity).

Also updates InvocationsActivitySource to map its session_id parameter to
microsoft.session.id instead of gen_ai.conversation.id.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Treat empty/whitespace baggage values as absent

Use string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace instead of null check when reading
session_id and conversation_id from OTel baggage. Prevents stamping
empty span attributes when callers set baggage to "" for absent values.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
